Title: Test user creation
Test Data:
- Valid name: John Doe
- Valid email: john.doe@example.com
- Valid password: password123
- Invalid email: john.doe
- Invalid password: password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page
2. Enter the valid name, email, and password
3. Click the "Register" button
4. Verify that the user is successfully created
5. Repeat steps 2-4 with invalid email and password
6. Verify that the user is not created with invalid inputs
Expected Result:
- The system creates a new user with valid inputs
- The system does not create a new user with invalid inputs

Title: Test product modification
Preconditions: A user is logged in as a seller
Test Data:
- Product name: Test Product
- New product name: New Test Product
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a seller
2. Navigate to the product modification page
3. Select the product to modify
4. Enter the new product name
5. Click the "Modify" button
6. Verify that the product is successfully modified
Expected Result: - The system modifies the product with valid inputs

Title: Test product modification with invalid inputs
Preconditions: A user is logged in as a seller
Test Data:
- Product name: Test Product
- Empty new product name
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a seller
2. Navigate to the product modification page
3. Select the product to modify
4. Enter an empty new product name
5. Click the "Modify" button
6. Verify that an error message is displayed
Expected Result: - The system does not modify the product with invalid inputs

Title: Test product addition
Preconditions: A user is logged in as a seller
Test Data:
- Product name: Test Product
- Product price: 10.00
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a seller
2. Navigate to the product addition page
3. Enter the product name and price
4. Click the "Add" button
5. Verify that the product is successfully added
Expected Result: - The system adds the product with valid inputs

Title: Test product addition with invalid inputs
Preconditions: A user is logged in as a seller
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a seller
2. Navigate to the product addition page
3. Enter an empty product name and valid price
4. Click the "Add" button
5. Verify that an error message is displayed
Expected Result: - The system does not add the product with invalid inputs

Title: Test push notification
Test Steps:
1. Create a new product
2. Verify that the user receives a push notification
Expected Result: - The user receives a push notification for the new product

Title: Test in-app notification
Test Steps:
1. Create a new product
2. Verify that the user receives an in-app notification
Expected Result: - The user receives an in-app notification for the new product

Title: Test no notification for non-preferred seller
Preconditions: A user has a preferred seller
Test Data: - New product: Test Product (not from the preferred seller)
Test Steps:
1. Create a new product (not from the preferred seller)
2. Verify that the user does not receive a push or in-app notification
Expected Result: - The user does not receive a push or in-app notification for the new product (not from the preferred seller)
